title: Expanded Armory: Legacy
description: An add-on for Balkon's WeaponMod: Legacy that adds more weapons
body:
# Expanded Armory: Legacy

![Nether Quartz, Manasteel, and Thaumium Weapons](http://puu.sh/ga8HX/9f0d8dc695.png)

Expanded Armory: Legacy is a simple mod, It takes the Tool Materials from other mods and brings them to Balkon's WeaponMod: Legacy.

Currently supported mods include, *but are not limited to*:

*   Applied Energistics 2
    *   Certus Quartz Weapons
    *   Nether Quartz Weapons
*   Botania
    *   Manasteel (Will use Mana from a Tablet or Ring instead of taking damage)
*   Thaumcraft
    *   Thaumium (Can be Enchanted with Repair!)
    *   Void Metal (Can be Enchanted with Repair! Naturally Repairs)
*   SimpleOres
    *   Adamantium
    *   Onyx
*   Fusion
    *   Thyrium
    *   Sinisite
*   Netherrocks
    *   Malachite
    *   Ashstone
    *   Dragonstone
    *   Argonite
*   Common Metals  
    *   Bronze
    *   Steel
*   Many more!!!

As a note, the flails are weird... they're weird even in Balkon's WeaponMod: Legacy, they're included mostly for the sake of completeness.

Please note, this mod REQUIRES Balkon's WeaponMod: Legacy and Forge 1291 or higher.
